instructions: Read all Bug *.md files in the input folder to check for duplicates before creating a new bug.
If a matching open bug is found — link it. Do NOT create a duplicate.
Write outputs/bug_decision.json as described in the prompt.
If action is 'create', also write outputs/bug_description.md in Jira Markdown format.
agentParams.formattingRules: outputs/bug_decision.json must be valid JSON. 'action' must be one of: 'link', 'create', 'none', 'tests_pass'.

customParams.openBugsJql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in (Bug) AND status not in (Done)
